raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is reachable by the right arm; there is a clear lateral contact point on box_2 that does not intersect the cup_1 area in front of box_2; stabilizing box_2 will not push it into cup_1.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is laterally constrained by the right end-effector to reduce motion while separating/grasping the attached box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left arm has unobstructed lateral access to box_1; enough clearance exists around box_1 for a non-claw encompassing grasp (box is 30x30x30 cm, too large for claw); right arm is stabilizing box_2 to prevent both boxes from moving together due to attachment.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held by the left end-effector and can be lifted; box_2 remains stabilized and does not follow box_1 despite attachment forces."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is held/controlled by the left end-effector; right end-effector continues stabilizing box_2; there is small free space to allow a controlled lateral/shearing motion to break the attachment without colliding with cup_1 (located in front of box_2).",
    "Postcondition": "The attachment between box_1 and box_2 is separated (or sufficiently loosened) while box_1 remains under left-arm control and box_2 remains in place."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is separated from box_2; there is clearance on both sides of box_1 for two-arm lateral support; cup_1 is not in the lift path.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely grasped with two-arm lateral support for a stable lift of the large (30 cm) box."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 5,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is securely supported by both arms; right arm can safely release box_2 without causing box_2 to tip or slide toward cup_1.",
    "Postcondition": "right end-effector is no longer constraining box_2; box_2 remains on the table."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 6,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "A clear placement region on the table is available away from cup_1 and box_2; the robot is holding box_1 securely and can lower it vertically without collision.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 (the darker box) is placed down under controlled support and released, completing the pick-up-and-relocate action."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is reachable by the right arm; there is a clear lateral contact point on box_2 that does not intersect the cup_1 area in front of box_2; stabilizing box_2 will not push it into cup_1.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is laterally constrained by the right end-effector to reduce motion while separating/grasping the attached box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: The left arm has unobstructed lateral access to box_1; enough clearance exists around box_1 for a non-claw encompassing grasp (box is 30x30x30 cm, too large for claw); right arm is stabilizing box_2 to prevent both boxes from moving together due to attachment.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held by the left end-effector and can be lifted; box_2 remains stabilized and does not follow box_1 despite attachment forces.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is held/controlled by the left end-effector; right end-effector continues stabilizing box_2; there is small free space to allow a controlled lateral/shearing motion to break the attachment without colliding with cup_1 (located in front of box_2).
parsed_json.Postcondition: The attachment between box_1 and box_2 is separated (or sufficiently loosened) while box_1 remains under left-arm control and box_2 remains in place.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is separated from box_2; there is clearance on both sides of box_1 for two-arm lateral support; cup_1 is not in the lift path.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely grasped with two-arm lateral support for a stable lift of the large (30 cm) box.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is securely supported by both arms; right arm can safely release box_2 without causing box_2 to tip or slide toward cup_1.
parsed_json.Postcondition: right end-effector is no longer constraining box_2; box_2 remains on the table.

parsed_json.Precondition: A clear placement region on the table is available away from cup_1 and box_2; the robot is holding box_1 securely and can lower it vertically without collision.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 (the darker box) is placed down under controlled support and released, completing the pick-up-and-relocate action.
